about.title: About Hot News Digest
about.lead: Hot News Digest is an aggregation platform that helps users quickly understand trending topics and content from major platforms.
about.mission: In the age of information overload, people are often overwhelmed by fragmented content. We hope Hot News Digest helps users efficiently access trending content across platforms, saving time without missing what matters.
about.platforms: We currently support trending content from 17 major platforms, including social media, news, tech communities and video platforms. Content is updated every 30 minutes to keep information timely.
about.api: We provide a RESTful API so developers can fetch trending data from each platform. It is easy to use, supports CORS, and detailed usage instructions are available on the homepage.
about.privacy: We value user privacy and do not collect personally identifiable information. We only use cookies to remember your theme preferences such as dark mode for a better experience.
about.contact: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to contact us through the following methods:
about.disclaimer: Hot News Digest only aggregates trending content from third-party platforms and is not responsible for the accuracy or legality of the content. All copyrights belong to the original authors or platforms. If any content infringes rights, please contact us for removal.
